title: Floral, Flaky Turkish Beef Kofte
description: A nostalgic Turkish dish featuring feather blade beef and a dairy-free pasta-water-emulsion.
instructions: Soak the bulghur in water for 30 minutes, then drain and squeeze out excess water.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the onion and cook until translucent.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, bulghur, onion mixture, parsley, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pasta water to the bowl and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small kofte.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium-high heat. Cook the kofte in batches until browned on all sides.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
